title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> If a sabotage attempt fails, the play
content:
✔ If a sabotage attempt fails, the player is banned from rerolls for 2 weeks.
✔ If a “heroic sacrifice” fails, the player loses 50 XP and cannot unlock items for 1 week.
✔ If a betrayal attempt is caught, the player must perform a public defense of their actions (a rhetorical trial in class).

✅ Why This Works:
• Prevents reckless “spam attempts” at sabotage or gambits.
• Forces students to think before engaging in high-risk actions.
• Adds real consequences for deception and strategy.

📜 3. The Cerberus Challenge – A Hidden Final Test OR a Secret Escape Route

📜 Top XP earners are granted a final literary “trial”—unless they find the hidden shortcut.

✔ If they choose to face the challenge, they must prove their mastery in a high-stakes literary gauntlet.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 212 (chunk 212/555)
